title: SingleMetricAnomalyDetector
description: Designates the CloudWatch metric and statistic that provides the time series the anomaly detector uses as input.

AccountId.description: If the CloudWatch metric that provides the time series is in another account, use this to specify that account ID.

Namespace.description: The namespace of the metric to create the anomaly detection model for.

MetricName.description: The name of the metric to create the anomaly detection model for.

Dimensions.description: The metric dimensions to create the anomaly detection model for.

Stat.description: The statistic to use for the metric and anomaly detection model.
